design_brief.goal: Convert homeowners into paying customers for professional mowing and landscaping services through trust-building and clear lead capture
design_brief.audience: Homeowners who value curb appeal and are willing to pay for professional mowing and landscaping services

visual_direction.layout: Hero-first design with prominent before/after imagery, testimonial carousels, and strategic popup placement that doesn't interrupt core user flows
visual_direction.typography: Script/cursive fonts for brand accents and emotional appeal, paired with clean sans-serif for service details and readability
visual_direction.color_usage: Rich greens as primary (lawn association) with earth tones and white space to convey premium quality and natural expertise
visual_direction.motion: Smooth image sliders showcasing before/after work, subtle fade-ins for testimonials, and non-intrusive timed popups (30+ seconds delay)
visual_direction.density: Spacious layout that lets hero imagery breathe while maintaining clear service information hierarchy

content_priorities: Lead capture with clear contact methods and service area coverage
Visual proof of mowing precision and landscaping transformations through before/after imagery
avoid: Image sliders that auto-advance too quickly
Cursive text for body content that hurts readability
Diluting focus with unrelated services like pool cleaning or pest control

tech_recommendations.reason: Content-heavy site benefits from a CMS for easy updates
Already configured — free tier, CDN, instant deploys
Contact forms on static sites need a form backend service
